feed.title: Errant Thinking - Blog Bandwagon
feed.subtitle: Asking insightful questions. Seeking thoughtful answers.

entry.title: Tiny Epics: Small Souls in a Big World!
entry.summary: The small ones among us are sometimes overlooked, but they surely have grand tales to tell! This March, let's explore these tiny epics for the RPG Blog Carnival. This is a community event, so we'll ponder some ideas for this theme, then get to creating and start some discussion! Share your creations with me early and I'll do weekend updates along with a final roundup on March 31st.

entry.title: The Rime Ridge
entry.summary: As part of Prismatic Wasteland's Rankin/Bass-themed 2025 Merry Hexmas, I present the Rime Ridge, a dense mountain range thick with fog that tends to freeze into hard rime ice upon all surfaces. An icey mist covered mountain range inspired by the Misty Mountains of Rankin/Bass's films 1977 "The Hobbit" and 1964 "Rudolph's Shiny New Year".
